## Securities Class Action Filed Against Photronics (PLAB); Lead Plaintiff Deadline September 4, 2026

A securities class action introduces legal overhang and headline risk for PLAB; the multi-firm solicitation pattern is a risk signal worth flagging regardless of ultimate case merit, as it can suppress the stock ahead of resolution.

- At least three law firms — Hagens Berman, Faruqi & Faruqi, and SueWallSt — are publicizing a securities class action lawsuit against Photronics
- The lead plaintiff deadline is September 4, 2026
- No specific allegations, underlying conduct, or damages figures are disclosed in the headlines
- Multi-firm solicitation activity suggests the case may be substantive, though the basis is unconfirmed in coverage
